daily_script:
*(Video opens with an energetic, upbeat intro graphic and music. Host appears, smiling and confident.)*

**Host:** "Alright team, let's hit today's market vibe! SPY took a little breath, down just under 1%, and the Nasdaq, QQQ, felt it a bit more, dipping 1.5%. Totally normal, folks! Just a shakeout, not a meltdown. Remember, dips are part of the long game—they shake out the weak hands and make room for bigger wins. Meanwhile, our crypto friend XRP? Chillin' like a villain, practically flat today. So, don't sweat the small stuff. Keep building those bags, stay focused on the horizon. Today's just another day in the journey, not the destination. Want to track this stress-free? Check our free, low-anxiety terminal—link is pinned!"

*(Video ends with a quick graphic displaying the terminal link and branding, music fades.)*
